title: Diversification preserves wealth, concentration builds wealth
html:
October 2021 Yahir paired investing axiom: "Diversification preserves wealth. Concentration builds wealth." Plus a follow-up self-task: "figure out regret minimization framework model" — direct reference to Bezos's regret minimization framework.

yahir gonzalez · regret minimization framework · buffett vs bezos · circle of competence

related.label: Buffett vs Bezos — preserve vs build
